---
name: Help wanted task
about: Create a scoped contributor task with clear implementation and verification notes
title: '[TASK] '
labels: help wanted
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

Describe the task in 1-3 sentences.

## Why this task exists

Explain the product, contributor, or maintainer value.

## Scope

Be explicit about the intended implementation area:

- Suggested files or directories:
- Out of scope:

## Starting points

Link or mention the existing code paths, docs, or examples that will help a contributor begin quickly.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Test plan

Describe the commands or manual checks needed to verify the change.

## Notes for contributors

Include any caveats, permissions, or repo-specific guidance here.
